fields.name: offense_category
fields.description: {"value":"Higher level category used to group similar types of offenses.","fieldValueType":"typeOrCategory"}

fields.name: incident_occurred_at
fields.description: {"value":"When the incident was reported to have occurred, recorded as a timestamp. If an incident occurred over a period of time, the timestamp represents the beginning of that period.","fieldValueType":"dateAndTime"}
